decontamination_notes: Real feature from colinhacks/zod PR #5770 (closes #5625), merged 2026-04-28, after model training cutoffs. Adds a net-new invertCodec(codec) function to BOTH the classic (packages/zod/src/v4/classic/schemas.ts) and mini (v4/mini/schemas.ts) APIs: constructs a new pipe-typed codec with in/out schemas swapped and transform/reverseTransform swapped, without mutating the original. Multi-file: the model must discover the parallel classic/mini structure and each API's conventions (the surface exports flow through external.ts re-exports). Zod is a zero-runtime-dependency TypeScript monorepo; source uses extensionless ESM imports, so hidden tests run via tsx (pinned in the node-ts image) with node:test. Repo sliced at the PR base commit (66k LOC, invertCodec absent); MIT LICENSE preserved. Coverage floor: 5 fail_to_pass tests (transform swap, schema swap incl. safeDecode failure path, double-inversion round-trip, no-mutation, mini-API parity) plus an invert-independent regression guard.

fail_to_pass.name: invert_swaps_transforms
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb invert swaps decode and encode$' vb_invert_codec.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: invert_swaps_schemas
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb invert swaps the schemas$' vb_invert_codec.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: no_mutation
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb invert does not mutate the original codec$' vb_invert_codec.test.ts

fail_to_pass.name: mini_parity
fail_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb mini api has invertCodec too$' vb_invert_codec.test.ts

pass_to_pass.name: codec_unaffected
pass_to_pass.cmd: tsx --test --test-name-pattern='^vb existing codec behavior unaffected$' vb_regression.test.ts
